2605.27358.title: MobileMoE: Scaling On-Device Mixture of Experts
2605.27358.paper_summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) has become the de facto architecture for hundred-billion-parameter language models, yet its advantages at sub-billion scales for on-device deployment remain largely unexplored. To close this gap, we present MobileMoE, a family of on-device MoE language models with sub-billion active parameters (0.3-0.9B active and 1.3-5.3B total) that establish a new Pareto frontier for on-device LLMs. We first formulate an on-device MoE scaling law that jointly optimizes MoE architecture under mobile memory and compute constraints, identifying an on-device sweet spot - moderate sparsity with fine-grained and shared experts - that is simultaneously memory and compute-optimal. Building on the derived architectures, we train MobileMoE with a four-stage recipe covering pre-training, mid-training, instruction fine-tuning, and quantization-aware training, all on open-source datasets. Across 14 benchmarks, MobileMoE matches or exceeds leading on-device dense LLMs with 2-4$\times$ fewer inference FLOPs, and matches or surpasses the state-of-the-art MoE OLMoE-1B-7B with up to 60% fewer parameters. To bridge the last mile to mobile deployment, we provide the first efficient MoE inference on commodity smartphones with comprehensive on-device profiling. At comparable INT4 weight memory, MobileMoE-S delivers $1.8$-$3.8\times$ faster prefill and $2.2$-$3.4\times$ faster decode than the dense baseline MobileLLM-Pro.
2605.27358.paper_summary_zh: 混合專家（MoE）已成為百億參數語言模型的事實標準架構，但其在不足十億規模下的設備端部署優勢仍然大多未被探索。為了填補這一空白，我們提出了MobileMoE，一系列具有不足十億活躍參數（0.3-0.9B活躍和1.3-5.3B總體）的設備端MoE語言模型，為設備端LLM建立了一個新的Pareto邊界。我們首先制定了一個設備端MoE縮放法則，該法則在移動內存和計算約束下共同優化MoE架構，識別出一個設備端的最佳點——中等稀疏度，具有細粒度和共享專家的特性——這在內存和計算上都是最佳的。基於所推導的架構，我們使用涵蓋預訓練、中訓練、指令微調和量化感知訓練的四階段食譜訓練MobileMoE，所有這些都在開源數據集上進行。在14個基準測試中，MobileMoE的推理FLOPs比領先的設備端密集LLM少2-4倍，並且在參數數量上與最先進的MoE OLMoE-1B-7B相匹配或超越，最多減少60%的參數。為了縮短到移動部署的最後一公里，我們提供了首個在商用智能手機上高效的MoE推理，並進行了全面的設備端分析。在可比的INT4權重內存下，MobileMoE-S的預填充速度比密集基線MobileLLM-Pro快$1.8$-$3.8\times$，解碼速度快$2.2$-$3.4\times$。
2605.27358.author: Yanbei Chen et.al.
2605.27358.authors: Yanbei Chen, Hanxian Huang, Ernie Chang, Jacob Szwejbka, Digant Desai, Zechun Liu, Vikas Chandra, Raghuraman Krishnamoorthi
